title: Johann Sperger through Time and Bass

content.value: With Darija Andzakovic and Natalia Duarte. We retraced Sperger's route from Trieste to Venice, recording soundscapes and using them to train and navigate a RAVE model — exploring the relationship between past and present musical technologies through a historically-informed approach.
